title: ValidValues

values.description: Enumeration of allowed string values (used when kind is 'enumeration').

min.description: Minimum allowed numeric value (used when kind is 'range').

max.description: Maximum allowed numeric value (used when kind is 'range').

pattern.description: Regular expression the field value must match (used when kind is 'regex').

description: A constraint on the acceptable values for an EntityField, expressed as an enumeration of allowed values, a numeric range (min/max), or a regular expression pattern.
